label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19

extraction.one_line_summary: PEDERSEN Mads won sprint finish after Trek-Segafredo controlled pace over dual mountain laps to shed rival sprinters.
tactical_patterns: Trek-Segafredo imposed climbing pace on dual-lap circuit specifically to eliminate faster pure sprinters before town finish.
Breakaway minimized to three riders suggesting peloton consensus to preserve sprint finish despite mountain laps in circuit.
CARAPAZ Richard harvested KOM points on Cat-2 climb despite no GC ambitions, revealing points jersey prioritization over stage hunting.

rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: converted team's mountain-pace domestique work into third stage win, showing climbing durability rivals lack
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: neutral: survived Trek's climbing pace but lacked finishing speed against Pedersen in reduced sprint
rider_signals.SCOTSON Miles: negative: forced to launch desperate early move suggesting inability to match Pedersen's combination speed
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: gained only two seconds despite GC rivals passive, suggesting tomorrow's mountains offer final attack window
